hero.title: Hi!, I'm Tony
hero.subtitle: Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable applications
hero.description: From e-commerce platforms to real-time drone management systems, focused on clean architecture, performance, and intuitive user experiences.

items.name: Drone Management System
items.description: Developed a scalable web application for managing autonomous drone operation, including real-time telemetry, mission tracking, and operational status through interactive views, including maps, tables, calendars and PDF reports. With a multi-tenant architecture for companies, locations, and routes.

items.name: Portfolio Dashboard
items.description: Designed and developed a modern portfolio application featuring reusable components, responsive layouts, and interactive UI elements, with a focus on performance and maintainability.

items.name: E-commerce Platform
items.description: Built a full-featured e-commerce platform with product management, payment integration, and deployment to production environments.

steps.title: Analyze
steps.description: I analyze requirements, user flows, and business needs to define clear and effective solutions.

steps.title: Architect
steps.description: I design scalable frontend architectures using reusable components, design patterns, and modular structure.

steps.title: Develop
steps.description: I build high-quality applications using React, TypeScript, and modern tools, focusing on performance and maintainability.

steps.title: Iterate
steps.description: I refine and improve applications through feedback, optimization, and continuous enhancement of the user experience.

description: Developed and customized e-commerce platforms using WordPress and WooCommerce, including product management, payment integration, and responsive UI design. Managed deployment and hosting using Hostinger.

Built a personal portfolio and content management system using React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Three.js, enabling modular content handling and dynamic project updates. Deployed using GitHub Pages.

Developed a scalable React-based web application using reusable components and design patterns with Storybook, including monitoring of routes, flight status, and scheduled missions across multiple views.
Designed and implemented institutional websites using React and WordPress, integrating multimedia content such as videos and animations.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in agile environments, contributing to the planning, design, and implementation of new features and interfaces.
Developed responsive web and mobile applications using Angular and Flutter, integrating backend services with Firebase (Realtime Database and Firestore).
Managed application deployment and hosting across platforms such as GitHub Pages, Firebase Hosting, and VPS environments.
